summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lagos Heat Map and VibeReactor Modal features. All major functionality working correctly with 100% backend success and 95% frontend success.

design_issues.issue: SVG text element hover testing limited by Playwright SVG access
design_issues.note: Venue dots are interactive, but tooltip content verification had technical limitations

passed_tests: Lagos Heat Map section renders with venue dots (data-testid='heatmap-section')
Heat Map SVG displays with district labels (VICTORIA ISLAND, IKOYI, LEKKI)
Heat Map shows 52 circles (venue dots with color-coded energy states)
Heat Map legend shows Electric 80+, Warming 60-79, Quiet <60
Demo Reactor button exists and clickable (data-testid='demo-reactor-btn')
Reactor displays venue score and name in center (data-testid='reactor-score')
Reactor skin navigation works - confirmed 'Neon Bloom' skin name displays
Reactor energy slider changes displayed score (data-testid='reactor-slider')
Reactor venue pills switch between Escape, Quilox, Club Joker (data-testid='reactor-venue-0', etc)
Canvas animations present with correct dimensions (1920x1080)
All previous features work: Lagos Pulse, waitlist ('Get Early Access'), API endpoints
GET /api/v1/agent/venues/live?city=lagos&limit=20 returns all 10 venues with coordinates
All 13 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
/docs page accessible and displays API documentation

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor testing limitations)
